summary: Phase 1 Step 1.6 Athlete Placeholder Dashboard - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 9/9 relevant tests passed (health check failure is unrelated). Frontend: All 4 feature tests passed via Playwright.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - endpoint doesn't exist (not a Step 1.6 issue)

critical_code_review_comments: athlete_self.py: GET /athlete/me correctly restricts to athlete/parent roles only (403 for director/coach)
athlete_self.py: Returns claimed=True with full athlete data + coach info when user has linked athlete record
athlete_self.py: Returns claimed=False with athlete=None, coach=None for unclaimed users
AthleteDashboard.js: Correctly handles all 3 states (loading, error, unclaimed, claimed)
AthleteDashboard.js: All required data-testid attributes present (athlete-welcome-name, athlete-snapshot, athlete-profile-info, athlete-coach-info, athlete-dashboard-unclaimed, athlete-quick-links)
Quick links (Pipeline, Schools, Calendar, Inbox) are correctly disabled with 'Soon' label
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test users from iteration_48
context_for_next_testing_agent: Step 1.6 Athlete Dashboard fully verified. Key features: (1) emma.chen@athlete.capymatch.com is a CLAIMED athlete - shows full dashboard with Welcome header, recruiting snapshot (Momentum -5 Declining, Stage Actively Recruiting, School Targets 4, Active Interest 0), profile info (Position: Defender, Team: U17 Premier, Grad Year: 2026), Coach Williams info. (2) aria.brooks@example.com is an UNCLAIMED athlete - shows unclaimed state with message to contact coach/director. (3) Director/Coach get 403 on GET /api/athlete/me. (4) Role-based routing regression verified - director→/mission-control, coach→/mission-control.

claimed_athlete_backend.details: GET /api/athlete/me returns claimed=True with full athlete data and coach info

unclaimed_athlete_backend.details: GET /api/athlete/me returns claimed=False with athlete=None, coach=None

recruiting_snapshot.details: Shows Momentum, Stage, School Targets, Active Interest with data-testid='athlete-snapshot'

profile_info.details: Shows Position, Team, Grad Year with data-testid='athlete-profile-info'

unclaimed_state_frontend.details: aria.brooks sees unclaimed state with data-testid='athlete-dashboard-unclaimed'

quick_links_disabled.details: Pipeline, Schools, Calendar, Inbox disabled with 'Soon' label
